name: seam
description: Smart lock integration skills for Seam. Three focused skills: Reservation Automations (push data, Seam handles codes), Access Grants (per-door credential control), and Access Codes (direct manual control). Includes the Seam docs MCP server for real-time API reference.

interface.longDescription: Three focused skills for integrating Seam smart lock access codes: Reservation Automations for PMS apps, Access Grants for hotels and gyms, and Access Codes for coworking and custom access. Includes the Seam docs MCP server for real-time API reference.
